stage_1.name: candidates.tsv
stage_1.description: Entity and relation candidates extracted from source text

stage_1.name: raw_triples.nt
stage_1.description: Initial triple dump in N-Triples format before linking

stage_1.name: stage1_log.json
stage_1.description: Processing log with token counts and timing

stage_2.name: linked_triples.nt
stage_2.description: Triples after entity linking and disambiguation

stage_2.name: linking_report.json
stage_2.description: Linking statistics: hit rate, NIL counts, confidence histogram

stage_3.name: final_kg.ttl
stage_3.description: Final knowledge graph serialised as Turtle

stage_3.name: eval_report.json
stage_3.description: Full evaluation metrics dump (precision, recall, F1 per relation type)

stage_3.name: run_summary.json
stage_3.description: High-level run metadata: pipeline ID, timestamp, total triples, wall time
